description: Baseline: 706 source lines, 79 tests passing

asi.hypothesis: baseline measurement
asi.notes: 706 lines across index.ts(263) + utils.ts(200) + state.ts(38) + zip-repo/index.ts(205). Targets: remove section comments, fix README inconsistency, remove duplicate SAFE_PLAN_TOOLS, consider removing vitest.config.ts

description: Remove noise: section comments, duplicate const, vitest.config.ts, numbered step comments, fix README

asi.hypothesis: Remove section comments, duplicate SAFE_PLAN_TOOLS, vitest.config.ts, numbered comments in zip-repo, fix README shortcut
asi.changes: index.ts: removed 10 section comments + deduplicated SAFE_PLAN_TOOLS Set. utils.ts: removed 6 section comments. state.ts: removed 2 section comments. zip-repo/index.ts: removed 15 numbered step comments. Deleted vitest.config.ts (default-only config). Fixed README shortcut Ctrl+Alt+P → Cmd+P.

description: Remove test section dividers, trim utils.ts header

asi.changes: Removed decorative section dividers from plan-mode.test.ts (18 lines of ===). Trimmed utils.ts header comment.
asi.hypothesis: Remove decorative separator lines from tests

description: Remove decorative test separators, trim stale utils.ts header

description: Remove unnecessary sanitizePlanTools call — DEFAULT_PLAN_TOOLS has no write tools

asi.hypothesis: sanitizePlanTools(DEFAULT_PLAN_TOOLS) is identity — remove the call

description: Remove redundant resetBlockTracking() init, consolidate duplicate notify call

asi.changes: Removed unnecessary resetBlockTracking() call at init time (vars already initialized). Consolidated duplicate ctx.ui.notify('main') in exitPlanMode into single call.
asi.hypothesis: Remove redundant initialization and duplicate notify call

asi.changes: Only removed stale comment from test file — no source line change

description: Collapse DEFAULT_PLAN_TOOLS into SAFE_PLAN_TOOLS

asi.hypothesis: Merge DEFAULT_PLAN_TOOLS and SAFE_PLAN_TOOLS

description: Trim verbose overlayDirtyFiles JSDoc — types make params self-documenting

asi.changes: Trimmed verbose JSDoc on overlayDirtyFiles from 7 lines to 1 — params are self-documenting from TypeScript types
asi.hypothesis: Reduce verbose JSDoc where types are sufficient

description: Extract errMsg helper — net +2 lines, reverting

asi.hypothesis: Extract errMsg helper to deduplicate error formatting
asi.result: Net +2 lines — helper definition costs more than inline savings

description: Consolidate regex patterns: merge 60+ single-command patterns into grouped alternations

asi.hypothesis: Merge simple bare-command regex patterns into single alternation regexes in utils.ts
asi.result: 621→566 (-55 lines). DESTRUCTIVE_PATTERNS: 14 file-op patterns→1, 7 process/power patterns→3. SAFE_PATTERNS: 35 bare-command patterns→1, 6 modern-tool patterns→1. All 79 tests pass — identical matching behavior.
asi.changes: utils.ts DESTRUCTIVE_PATTERNS: merged rm/rmdir/mv/cp/mkdir/touch/chmod/chown/chgrp/ln/tee/truncate/dd/shred into single alternation. Merged sudo+su, kill+pkill+killall, reboot+shutdown. SAFE_PATTERNS: merged 35 bare-command patterns into single alternation, merged jq/awk/rg/fd/bat/eza into single alternation.

description: Merge two git rev-parse calls into one in zip-repo (guard was redundant)

asi.changes: Merged two git rev-parse calls into one in zip-repo — --show-toplevel fails outside git repos just like --is-inside-work-tree, so the separate guard was redundant
asi.hypothesis: Combine redundant git rev-parse calls

description: Un-export WRITING_TOOL_NAMES and BLOCK_REASON_HEADER (not used outside utils.ts)

asi.changes: Un-exported WRITING_TOOL_NAMES and BLOCK_REASON_HEADER — not referenced outside utils.ts (tests only call buildBlockReason and check output strings). Reordered to put const before usage.
asi.hypothesis: Un-export internal-only constants

description: Merge --show-toplevel and HEAD into single git rev-parse call in zip-repo

asi.changes: Merged remaining two git rev-parse calls (--show-toplevel + HEAD) into single call. git rev-parse accepts multiple refs/flags and outputs one result per line.
asi.hypothesis: Merge --show-toplevel and HEAD into single git rev-parse call

description: Extract resetPlanState helper — net +2 lines, reverting

asi.hypothesis: Extract resetPlanState() helper to deduplicate state reset in enterPlanMode/exitPlanMode
asi.result: Net +2 lines — helper definition cost exceeds inline savings (3 lines saved × 2 sites = 6, but helper adds 5+1 call overhead)

description: Merge git/npm/yarn/node SAFE_PATTERNS, inline resetBlockTracking

asi.changes: 1) Merged 3 git SAFE_PATTERNS into 1 (ls-\S+ and submodule merged into main git pattern). 2) Merged npm+yarn safe patterns into 1. 3) Merged node+python --version into 1. 4) Inlined resetBlockTracking() — only called from turn_end, function wrapper was overhead.
asi.hypothesis: Merge remaining split SAFE_PATTERNS and inline single-use resetBlockTracking

asi.changes: Inlined isAssistantMessage and getTextContent into their single usage site (agent_end handler). Removed 2 module-level function declarations (-6 lines). Type guard and content extraction now directly at point of use.
